title: KV Dharamgarh Heat-Wave Early Dismissal Circular
subtitle: Administrative circular regarding early dismissal during extreme heat conditions

metadata.issuer: Principal, PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Dharamgarh

rawText:
KENDRIYA VIDYALAYA SANGATHAN
PM SHRI KENDRIYA VIDYALAYA DHARAMGARH
(KALAHANDI REGION, ODISHA)

Ref. No.: KVS/DHR/2328/2026-27/HEAT/001
Date: 15.06.2026

SUBJECT: EARLY DISMISSAL OF STUDENTS IN VIEW OF EXTREME HEAT WAVE CONDITIONS — COMPLIANCE WITH KVS REGIONAL OFFICE DIRECTIVE VIDE LETTER NO. RO/BBSR/2026/HEAT/003 DATED 14.06.2026

In pursuance of the directive issued by the Regional Office, KVS Bhubaneswar vide aforementioned reference, and in view of the prevailing extreme heat wave conditions in Kalahandi district as notified by the India Meteorological Department (IMD) with temperatures exceeding 45°C, the following arrangements shall be effective from 16.06.2026 until further orders:

1. All classes from I to XII shall be dismissed at 12:00 noon instead of the regular dismissal time of 3:30 PM. Students are directed to vacate the school premises within 30 minutes of dismissal.

2. Parents/Guardians of students availing school bus transport are hereby informed that the bus departure schedule stands revised. Buses shall depart from the school campus at 12:30 PM sharp. Students must report to their respective bus assembly points by 12:15 PM. No separate intimation shall be sent to individual parents.

3. Mid-day meal shall be served between 11:00 AM and 11:45 AM in the school cafeteria. Students enrolled under the MDM scheme must carry their meal cards. Failure to produce the meal card may result in non-issuance of the meal.

4. All outdoor activities including Physical Training (PT), games period, and NCC/Scout-Guide activities stand suspended until the heat wave advisory is withdrawn by the competent authority.

5. Teachers are directed to ensure adequate drinking water arrangements in their respective classrooms. Any case of heat-related illness must be reported to the school medical room immediately. Parents shall be contacted within 24 hours if their ward reports any symptoms of heat exhaustion.

6. This circular supersedes all previous communications on the subject. Non-compliance with the above instructions shall be viewed seriously.

Principal
PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya Dharamgarh

Copy to:
1. Chairman, VMC
2. All Section Heads
3. Transport In-charge
4. School Notice Board
